# free-toolbase.com - Free Online Tools (2019 tools)

> A collection of free, privacy-first online tools. All processing happens in your browser - no data is ever uploaded to servers.

## Tools
- webgpu-benchmark: WebGPU Benchmark - Test browser WebGPU performance with compute, render and memory bandwidth scores
- css-text-reveal-generator: CSS Text Reveal Generator - Create fade-in, typewriter, slide, flip text animation effects with live preview
- graphql-playground: GraphQL Playground - Write and execute GraphQL queries, mutations and subscriptions with syntax highlighting
- webhook-debugger: Webhook Debugger - Simulate receiving webhook requests, inspect headers, body and responses with JSON formatting
- svg-animation-generator: SVG Animation Generator - Create SVG path, stroke, and transform animations with live preview and code export

- [1337 Speak](https://free-toolbase.com/1337-speak/)
